title: Search
placeholder: Search issues, comments, documents, agents, projects…
initialDescription: Issues, comments, plan documents, agents, projects — same surface, ranked by relevance.
identifierHint: type {{code}} to jump straight to an issue.
quotedHint: wrap a phrase in quotes to match the exact sequence.
shortcutHint: reopens the command palette pre-seeded with your current query.
errorGuidance: Your input and filters are still here, so you can retry or fall back to the Issues filter.
noResultsDescription: We couldn't find a match in {{scope}}. Try widening the scope or rephrasing your query.
tryFewerTokens: Try fewer tokens or a single distinctive term.
